tool_args.label: Flatlands Ave 45% bus passenger share methodology note
tool_args.raw_text: Flatlands Ave showing afternoon city bus & school bus traffic during 'school rush hour'

payload.claim_text: When vehicle volumes are highest on Flatlands Ave, city bus passengers still make up 45% of people on the road.
payload.description: Flatlands Ave PM rush hour mode share: 45% bus passengers, 55% other vehicle occupants. Bus passenger count only includes MTA bus passengers, not school buses or other non-MTA buses. Vehicle occupancy rate of 1.2 from 2010 NYMTC Hub Bound Report used for calculations.
payload.subject: Flatlands Ave mode share

tool_args.label: Online feedback portal and contact information

payload.claim_text: You can provide it at your convenience online: www.nyc.gov/brt or nycdotfeedbackportals.nyc/south-brooklyn-sbs. To invite us to community events or give other feedback, please email us at brt@dot.nyc.gov
payload.subject: Community feedback channels
payload.description: Online feedback portal (www.nyc.gov/brt, nycdotfeedbackportals.nyc/south-brooklyn-sbs) and email (brt@dot.nyc.gov) for community input on South Brooklyn SBS
